overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player exploring a luxurious modern penthouse. The camera moves from a dimly lit interior space with glass skylights out onto a sunlit rooftop terrace with palm trees, modern outdoor furniture, and panoramic city views, with the player eventually drawing a futuristic weapon while approaching an exterior staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern penthouse interior corridor with glass ceiling

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit interior corridor, observing the atrium below through the glass floor panels

entered.detail: grid-patterned glass ceiling panels allowing natural light into the dark interior
lower level of the building visible through glass floor panels
tall dark structural column with vertical ribbing

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a sleek, dark interior corridor of a luxury penthouse, with a glass skylight ceiling above and views down to a lower atrium level through glass floor panels.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop terrace with infinity pool and city views

events.description: exits the interior space onto the sunlit rooftop terrace
lighting shifts from dim interior to bright direct sunlight causing lens flare

agents.ego_description: stepping out from the dark interior onto the bright terrace, approaching the outdoor lounge area with palm trees

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the terrace edge against the blue sky
transparent glass safety railing along the terrace edge
large rectangular red outdoor rug defining the lounge space
distant cityscape visible beyond the terrace

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the penthouse onto a spacious sunlit terrace with tall palm trees, modern white outdoor furniture on a red rug, and panoramic city views beyond the glass railing.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor lounge area with sectional sofa and coffee table

events.description: player character draws a futuristic rifle, weapon becomes visible in lower right of frame

agents.ego_description: circling around the outdoor furniture setup, examining the terrace lounge area while armed with a rifle

entered.detail: low dark coffee table with items on top including a lamp and containers
infinity edge swimming pool visible to the left of the terrace

segments.scene_description: The player explores the terrace lounge area featuring a white sectional sofa on a red rug, circling around a modern coffee table. At 32 seconds, the player draws a futuristic rifle, and the weapon appears in the lower right of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered terrace walkway leading to exterior staircase

events.description: moves under the wooden pergola, creating striped shadow patterns on the floor

agents.ego_description: walking along the terrace under the pergola shade toward the exterior staircase and glass door

entered.detail: overhead wooden slatted structure casting striped shadows on the terrace floor
floating wooden stairs with metal railings leading upward
dark framed glass door at the end of the terrace walkway

segments.scene_description: The player walks along the terrace under a wooden pergola that casts striped shadows, moving past the lounge area toward an exterior staircase and glass door at the end of the walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the moody, enclosed interior of a luxury penthouse out onto a bright, expansive rooftop terrace. It begins in a sleek, dark corridor beneath a glass skylight, where the view extends downward through transparent floor panels into a lower atrium. As the camera emerges from the interior, the environment shifts abruptly to a sunlit terrace featuring tall palm trees and panoramic city views beyond a glass railing. The scene then flows through a lounge area with a white sectional sofa and red rug, where a futuristic rifle is drawn into the lower right of the frame. Finally, the camera moves under a wooden pergola that casts striped shadows across the walkway, proceeding toward an exterior staircase and glass door.
